objective: Please continuously use all of the things you mentioned and build this one. Test it until all part is success. And search 10 popular open source code base to see the structure and how they promote. Build a self-autonomous one and keep building the solutions. You should build a whole repo that contains everything of the RePERS

requirements.title: Repository contains installable RePERS runtime, docs, tests, examples, hooks, and governance.
Package can be installed into another Git repository and verified there.
Reusable workflows are exposed through a machine-readable capability registry and preflight surface.
Large-task DAG orchestration has deterministic worker dispatch, review, and fixture proof.
Repository includes the 10-repository open-source structure and promotion study.
Smoke tests and package round-trip gates pass.
Repo carries machine-readable release, package, receiver, and publish handoff evidence.
Repo can be pushed and opened as a draft PR.

missing_for_publish: commit or intentionally exclude working tree changes
configure a Git remote before opening a PR

entries.name: Deterministic Orchestration Fixture
entries.summary: Proves conflict-safe worker dispatch, worker-command execution, local join verification, and review contracts.

entries.name: Task DAG Planning and Execution
entries.summary: Parses plan.md into plan.json, lists ready DAG steps, dispatches parallel worker prompts, and updates step status.

entries.name: Installed Receiver Acceptance Fixture
entries.summary: Installs the packaged RePERS archive into a fresh Git repository and proves receiver commands: verify-install, doctor, bundle-status, capabilities, and fixture.

entries.name: Review, Shipping, and Release Gates
entries.summary: Validates step result contracts, writes shipping evidence, and runs release gates over review, doctor, shipping, and audit.
